content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
H: header_spoof_auth_bypass ⇒ userIdTrustedFromHeader
P: strip_untrusted_header('x-user-id') → prefer(session_userId)
V: verify(userIdExists) ∧ test(headerSpoofing)
R: ! unvalidatedHeaderTrust ∧ ! potentialUnauthorizedAccess
A: AssessAuthorizationLogic ∧ StrengthenSessionManagement

[AUDIT]
Treat header_spoof_auth_bypass as a trust-boundary issue and apply strip_untrusted_header('x-user-id') before merge.
